title: Bare Refined (Bare Bones x Refined Storage)
description: Retextures the Refined Storage mod to fit in with Bare Bones resource pack, replicating the style of the trailers.
body:
![Bare Refined Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/65b0d7c80f3bbbf8adaaa08d61561663fa8e1a8c.png)
### Simplify your storage.

## Compatibility
Any file should work for any Minecraft version.

## Instructions
Intended for use with the 'Bare Bones' resource pack and 'Refined Storage' mod.

I personaly prefer the Jappafied version ;)
